title: No Woman Knows
writer: Tod Browning, Edna Ferber, George Yohalem
actors: Max Davidson, Snitz Edwards, Grace Marvin
plot: In Winnebago, Wisconsin, the Jewish Brandeis family--Molly, Ferdinand, and their two children Fanny and Theodore--run a modest dry-goods store. Theodore is studying violin and auditions for a famous violinist, The Great Schabelitz...
